LightningComponentBundle.description: Unified files UI for linked records (wire + optional upload). Packaging: Portal Add-On pages should use variant record only—do not ship a local compose modal; message attachment list (list) and composer buffer (composer) are used inside Core c-portal-messaging and c-portal-message-compose-modal, not in the add-on package.

property.name: variant
property.label: Variant
property.description: Experience Cloud: record only. list/composer are internal to Core messaging components.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Host record for linked files and/or lightning-file-upload.

property.name: variant
property.label: Variant
property.description: record: wire + upload. list/composer: used by Core messaging LWCs (c-portal-messaging, compose modal); not for Portal Add-On Experience pages.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: Host record for linked files and/or lightning-file-upload.
